name: mrpilot
description: AI code review for GitLab MRs and GitHub PRs using mr-pilot CLI

commands.description: Passthrough to mr-pilot CLI. Use --env-file <path> to load env vars, or export tokens before running.

adapterConfig.script: echo '=== mr-pilot Configuration Check ===' && echo '' && echo '1. Checking mr-pilot binary:' && which mr-pilot && mr-pilot --version 2>/dev/null || echo 'mr-pilot not found - run: npm i -g mr-pilot' && echo '' && echo '2. Checking parent process environment (set via export or prefix):' && ( [ -n "$GITLAB_TOKEN" ] && echo '✓ GITLAB_TOKEN available' || echo '✗ GITLAB_TOKEN not set' ) && ( [ -n "$GITHUB_TOKEN" ] && echo '✓ GITHUB_TOKEN available' || echo '✗ GITHUB_TOKEN not set' ) && ( [ -n "$OPENROUTER_API_KEY" ] && echo '✓ OPENROUTER_API_KEY available' || echo '✗ OPENROUTER_API_KEY not set' ) && echo '' && echo 'Usage:' && echo '  # Option 1: Export tokens' && echo '  export GITLAB_TOKEN=glpat-xxx' && echo '  export GITHUB_TOKEN=ghp_xxx' && echo '  export OPENROUTER_API_KEY=sk-or-xxx' && echo '  supercli mrpilot -- <mr-url> --platform github' && echo '' && echo '  # Option 2: Use env-file' && echo '  supercli mrpilot -- <mr-url> --platform github --env-file /path/to/.env'
